sample_requests: Run PLS-DA and OPLS-DA on the Pareto-scaled cachexia data and compare R2Y / Q2

Get per-feature AUC with 500-iteration bootstrap CIs for cachexic vs control

Decide between classifier='lr' / 'rf' / 'svm' for a small metabolomics cohort
